app_info.subtitle: Gestao veterinaria
app_info.description: PetOrlandia ajuda veterinarios e equipes clinicas a consultar pets, agenda e pendencias, gerar resumos clinicos e registrar atendimentos, exames, laudos e retornos com confirmacao explicita dentro do ChatGPT.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves pets accessible to the authenticated PetOrlandia user.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only retrieves appointments accessible to the authenticated PetOrlandia user.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only parses provided text into a draft and does not save data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Can create or update private PetOrlandia records after explicit confirmation.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only inside the authenticated user's PetOrlandia clinical workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete records or perform irreversible external actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates or reuses private tutor and pet records and may create initial consultations.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only inside PetOrlandia and does not publish externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete records or perform irreversible external actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates or updates a private clinical consultation in PetOrlandia.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only inside the PetOrlandia clinical record system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete records or perform irreversible external actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a private exam block and exam items for a patient.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only inside PetOrlandia and does not publish externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete records or perform irreversible external actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a private image exam record after explicit confirmation.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only inside PetOrlandia and does not publish externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete records or perform irreversible external actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Attaches an authorized PDF file to a private image exam after explicit confirmation.
justifications.open_world_justification: Writes only inside PetOrlandia file storage and clinical records.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete records or perform irreversible external actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes a private release flag after explicit confirmation.
justifications.open_world_justification: Shares access only inside the linked PetOrlandia clinic scope.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete records or revoke existing access.

justifications.read_only_justification: Changes a private tutor visibility flag after explicit confirmation.
justifications.open_world_justification: Shares access only with the linked tutor inside PetOrlandia.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete records or revoke existing access.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a secure onboarding invite after explicit confirmation.
justifications.open_world_justification: Creates an internal PetOrlandia invite link for the linked clinic.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete records or perform irreversible external actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates a secure tutor access invite after explicit confirmation.
justifications.open_world_justification: Creates an internal PetOrlandia invite link for the linked tutor.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete records or perform irreversible external actions.

justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: List pets available to the authenticated user.
test_cases.user_prompt: Liste meus pets cadastrados no PetOrlandia.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the user's accessible pets with identifying clinical details such as name, species, breed, sex, age, and weight.

test_cases.description: Review the veterinarian's appointments for the current day.
test_cases.user_prompt: Quais pacientes tenho hoje e quais pendencias clinicas aparecem para eles?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns today's accessible appointments with patient names and summarized pending vaccines, returns, or exams.

test_cases.description: Generate a clinical summary for a patient.
test_cases.user_prompt: Resuma o historico clinico da Luna.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a structured clinical summary for the matched animal, including recent consultations, prescriptions, exams, and pendencies.

test_cases.description: Create tutor and pet records only after explicit confirmation.
test_cases.user_prompt: Cadastre o tutor Joao, telefone 16999990000, com a pet Mel, cadela, e confirme a gravacao.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates or reuses the tutor and pet records and reports what was created or reused.

test_cases.description: Import a mobile ultrasound report from a pasted report text.
test_cases.user_prompt: Importe este laudo de ultrassom para a clinica Alfa, tutor Maria, paciente Nina, e confirme a gravacao: conclusao sem alteracoes relevantes.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates or reuses the clinic, tutor, animal, and completed exam record, then returns the recommended next action and message for the clinic.

test_cases.description: Open the visual review panel before importing a report.
test_cases.user_prompt: Abra o painel para eu revisar o laudo volante da Nina antes de gravar.
test_cases.expected_output: Renders the review widget with clinic, tutor, animal, exam, report text, and missing fields to confirm.

test_cases.description: Run the ultrasound image exam flow with PDF and releases.
test_cases.user_prompt: Conduza o fluxo do ultrassonografista para Ultrassonografia Abdominal do SID, tutor Rosa, clinica requisitante Angrisano, data 16/02/2026, profissional Robson Oliveira CRMV-MG 26136, com PDF anexado, e confirme cada gravacao quando eu autorizar.
test_cases.tools_triggered: criar_exame_imagem, anexar_pdf_exame_imagem, liberar_exame_para_clinica, gerar_convite_primeiro_acesso_clinica, liberar_exame_para_tutor, gerar_convite_acesso_tutor, listar_historico_medico_animal, obter_documento_clinico
test_cases.expected_output: Creates or reuses clinic, tutor, and animal records, creates the image exam, attaches the PDF, releases it according to permissions, returns invite links, and lists the exam in the animal medical history with a human-facing shareable_url or portal URL. Protected API URLs must not be presented as the exam link.

test_cases.description: Schedule a return from an existing consultation.
test_cases.user_prompt: Agende retorno da consulta 123 para 2026-06-15 as 14:00 e confirme a gravacao.
test_cases.expected_output: Creates a return appointment if the consultation is accessible and the requested time is valid.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated general veterinary advice.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Meu cachorro esta tossindo, o que pode ser?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked unless the user asks to use PetOrlandia data or record something in PetOrlandia.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not write without explicit confirmation.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Anote uma consulta da Luna com suspeita de dermatite.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The assistant should ask for confirmation or missing details before using any write tool.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated personal calendar requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Marque uma reuniao com meu contador amanha as 9h.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is outside PetOrlandia clinical workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not import unreachable local file paths.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Importe o laudo que esta em /mnt/data/laudo.pdf.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The assistant should request a supported ChatGPT file attachment, public URL, or pasted report text instead of relying on a local sandbox path.
